Oregon Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

13 senior living communities in Oregon — pick a city on the map, or browse the list. Hover or tap a community to see where it is.

What's available in Oregon

  • Assisted Living — 8 communities
  • Memory Care — 7 communities
  • Independent Living — 5 communities
  • Skilled Nursing — 5 communities
  • CCRC / Life Plan — 2 communities
  • Small Care Home — 1 community

How Oregon regulates senior care

Assisted living, residential care facilities, and memory care endorsements are licensed by ODHS Aging and People with Disabilities; Adult Foster Homes are the state's small-home option.

Small homes: Adult Foster Homes care for up to 5 residents in a residential home — how to evaluate one.

Oregon resources for families

  • Oregon Department of Human Services, Aging and People with Disabilities — license & inspection lookup (how to read reports)
  • Eldercare Locator — 1-800-677-1116 — free federal referral line to local aging services
  • Your local Area Agency on Aging — options counseling and help paying for care
  • Long-Term Care Ombudsman — resident advocates who know each facility's complaint history

New to this?

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
